name: airu
description: AI chat CLI with pattern recognition, multi-provider support, and agent loop
author: Airu

scripts.prepublishOnly: cd ../.. && bun run build && bun run typecheck && bun test
scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --target node --external ink --external react --external react-devtools-core && node -e "const f='dist/cli.js';const c=require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8');require('fs').writeFileSync(f,c.replace('#!/usr/bin/env bun','#!/usr/bin/env node'))"
